allow: Bash(# Find the actual resolved port from Local WP''s running config or site settings find ''/d/Local Sites/gmc/'' -name ""*.json"" -maxdepth 3)
Bash(# Check Local WP site port via netstat or process info netstat -ano)
Bash(# Try to find Local WP''s site config with actual port find ''/c/Users/Sunil/AppData/Roaming/Local'' -name ""sites.json"" -maxdepth 5)

Bash(python3 -c " import json with open\(''/c/Users/Sunil/AppData/Roaming/Local/sites.json''\) as f: data = json.load\(f\) for site_id, site in data.items\(\): if ''gmc'' in site.get\(''name'',''''\).lower\(\) or ''gmc'' in site.get\(''path'',''''\).lower\(\): print\(json.dumps\(site, indent=2\)\) ")
Bash(# Use grep to extract the gmc site''s ports grep -A 80 ''""name"":""GMC""'' ''/c/Users/Sunil/AppData/Roaming/Local/sites.json'')

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\Sunil\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
